requirements.task_name: Purchase the cheapest 3-day conference pass with workshop access under $700
requirements.task_description: From the conference website, find all 3-day passes that include at least 1 workshop credit, select the cheapest option that costs less than $700, and complete the on-site payment registration flow until the reservation is created.

requirements.task_name: Build a 4-session agenda across 2 days with at least one keynote and one AI track session
requirements.task_description: Create a personal agenda with exactly 4 sessions: at least 1 keynote, at least 1 session from the "AI & Machine Learning" track, all scheduled between 09:00 and 17:00, distributed across Day 1 (June 12) and Day 2 (June 13) without overlapping start times.

requirements.task_name: Add three evening networking events with free refreshments on Day 1 to your schedule
requirements.task_description: Identify networking events occurring on Day 1 (June 12) that start at or after 17:00 and include free refreshments, then add exactly three of these events to your personal schedule.

requirements.task_name: Choose the most advanced design thinking workshop under 3 hours and add it to your schedule
requirements.task_description: Among Day 2 workshops about design thinking that last 3 hours or less, select the workshop with the highest difficulty level (e.g., Advanced over Intermediate) that costs under $300, and add it to your personal schedule.

requirements.task_name: Bookmark two Gold-level AI tool exhibitors rated 4.0+ and book demo slots with both
requirements.task_description: Within the exhibitors section, filter for Gold sponsors offering AI tools, select two exhibitors with ratings of at least 4.0 stars, bookmark their booths, and schedule a 15-minute demo with each on Day 2 in the afternoon.

requirements.task_name: Save one nearby hotel under $220/night with breakfast included and 4.0+ rating
requirements.task_description: Using the conference travel section, find a hotel within 1 km of the venue that costs less than $220 per night, includes breakfast, and has a rating of at least 4.0, then add that hotel to your saved options list.

requirements.task_name: Add two short UX on-demand sessions from last year to your watchlist
requirements.task_description: Within the on-demand library, filter for sessions from the previous year in the "UX & Design" track that are 30 minutes or shorter, and add the first two such sessions to your watchlist.

requirements.task_name: Schedule three 20-minute meetings with UX designers from different companies on Day 2
requirements.task_description: Use the attendee directory to find three attendees with the role "UX Designer" from three different companies and send 20-minute 1:1 meeting requests to each on Day 2 (June 13) between 13:00 and 15:00.
